entry.title: Re: Mass Reversals or Mass Void of checks in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content: Was a solution identified for this? I am looking to mass void an entire check run to reprint them.

entry.title: Re: How to use recursive query in SQL Views in SAP Datasp...
entry.content:
I am not sure if you can do this in DSP.  It is possible in HANA, or when you use DB-Explorer from DSP, but not directly in DSP

What you can do is to build hierarchy on top of a dimension.

entry.title: Question regarding Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) Minor Work
entry.content:
Hi, this is a question regarding the EAM Minor Work Process.  We have given the authorization for the Maintenance Planner and the Maintenance Supervisor to create minor work maintenance request (Business Catalog SAP_EAM_BC_EXCP_MREQ_MNG_PC restriction type Notification Processing Context IECP_MN.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.1 Minor Work - Create Maintenance Request. The Maintenance Planner creates the minor work maintenance request and once created it is available in the Accepted tab in My Maintenance Request.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.2 Minor Work - Record Malfunction Details. The Maintenance Technician checks the accepted maintenance request and records the malfunction data for the maintenance request created by the planner.  The issue we have is that since the maintenance request for minor work was created by the Maintenance Planner, this request cannot be displayed to the Maintenance Technician.  Our presumption is that you can only see your own maintenance requests in My Maintenance Request.  Can you please confirm that there is an error in the SAP script, or if there is another way for the Maintenance Technician to Record Malfunction details and complete notification for minor work if the maintenance request was completed by the planner or the supervisor role.  Thank you

entry.title: Re: Program for KSB1 to run multiple variants together
entry.content: Thanks Raymond. I already tried it but with that the excel is not even downloading & giving message as 'No ALV data found for variant: Var Name'.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2020: Missing Functionality in Fiori - My Inbox item details missing (F0862)
entry.content:
SAP-Notes 2663532 - Details of PO/PR are not shown in My Inbox app - SAP S/4HANA 1809 until 2021 and 3562914 - Purchase Order Approval Details display in fiori  provide info / solutions for S/4 versions 1809 through 2023 ...

Kind regards

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Guided Implementation App - How are T...
entry.content:
Hi, brad_saxon,
In case you haven't already figured this out, I was looking at your question and comparing it to what I am seeing in my Cloud ALM tenant.  You should see only tasks assigned to your user and/or your role (below e.g. Project Lead).

First, my project, PKA_S4N_S4HANA, is assigned to an SAP Activate Roadmap and I am assigned as the project lead:

When I go to the Guided Implementation for this project, I am seeing any tasks assigned to me or to my role from that roadmap within that phase (Discover) here in my example:

and the other task:

Since I am not the Business Process Owner, this task does not appear in my Guided Implementation view, even though it is in the Discover phase:

 

 

When I create a new Project in the Guided Implementation, I can actually pick a roadmap:

I hope this info helps answer your question.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: Payment Medium Format - Data Source in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @Jan-Niklas_S 

How to Cross Check in Your System

  • Use App: Manage Your Solution
  • Search SSCUI 101044 and open the config for your payment format
  • If the “Initiating Party ID” field is missing → your format may be locked by SAP standard logic
  • If editable, → changes here should reflect in <InitgPty> in the XML

If you want, share:

  • Your payment medium format ID (e.g., SEPA_CGI_XML_CT, US_PAIN_001, etc.)
  • Or a redacted XML snippet showing the two <Id> tags you're dealing with

Then I will double-check the mapping rules specific to that format

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Consuming a Third-Party SOAP Web Service in SAP Public Cloud via RAP
entry.content: removing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development

entry.title: Re: Set up connection between SAP C4C (Sales Cloud) and SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Is there any experience regarding the use and performance of the Survey-Collections? Especially SurveyQuestionAnswersCollection and SurveyResponseItemCollection?

We have problems loading those from Sales Cloud V1 to Datasphere using Remote Tables or Data Flows. There is no usable filtering option and the Sales Cloud OData is not able to deliver all records and fails during export. So currently we are not able to export those directly to Datasphere which is quite a blocker.

entry.title: Re: Criterio al articulo 29 de la Ley del INFONAVIT
entry.content:
Hola de nuevo Juan.

¿Puedes comentar que hacen con el /381 en la siguiente regla?

O tal vez tengan una versión de cliente para esa regla.

El tratamiento adecuado es que el /381 lo pasen de la IT a la RT en esa regla. Si no lo hacen ahí, asegúrate de que lo hagan antes de procesar la función PRPRI:

El error que te está señalando el CALC es que están llegando a la PRPRI con el /381 en la IT y, para entonces, ya debería estar en la RT.

entry.title: Boost Your Testing with Tricentis Test Automation (TTA) in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Introduction

Testing. It’s that one word in every SAP project that gets everyone either excited or terrified (mostly terrified 😅). Whether you’re running sprints or just sprinting away from deadlines, testing your application is crucial. But wait—what if I told you there’s a way to make this process faster, smarter, and much less painful?

Enter Tricentis Test Automation (TTA) integrated with SAP Cloud ALM. This combo is like Batman and Robin, but for your testing needs—automated, reliable, and surprisingly friendly.

In this blog, let’s explore this partnership and why it might just be the superhero your SAP project needs.

📚 Description

The image above shows the architecture and flow of Tricentis Test Automation (TTA) in SAP Cloud ALM. At a glance, it may look like an airport runway map 🛫, but don’t worry—we’ll land you safely.

 

Here’s the breakdown:

 

  • On the left, you’ve got SAP Cloud ALM—your control tower.
  • In the middle, you’ll find the Test Automation Endpoint that connects to the test engine.
  • On the right, there’s Tricentis Test Automation (Cloud)—your jet engine for executing tests.
  • Down below, there’s the Customer Landscape—the actual systems and execution agents doing the heavy lifting.

 

 

Let’s now break this down into digestible chunks.

 

 

⭐ Features

1. Test Orchestration in SAP Cloud ALM

  • This is where everything begins.
  • You manage ALM entities like:
    • Processes
    • Requirements
    • User Stories
    • Defects
  • It supports Manual Test Cases (yes, the old-school kind) and Automated Test Cases (the future is here).
  • Once executed, the Test Results flow back into Cloud ALM for reporting.
  • All of this is wrapped under a user-friendly umbrella of Analytics & Reporting.

📝 Pro Tip: Think of this like your project manager—always watching, always recording, and occasionally shouting “Why didn’t you log your defect?!”

2. Seamless Integration via APIs

  • SAP Cloud ALM talks to Tricentis Test Automation via test automation APIs.
  • These APIs push the test cases to the TTA platform and pull back the results.
  • The connection is smooth—like butter on a hot dosa 🍽️.

 

3. Tricentis Test Automation (Cloud Tenant)

 

  • This is where the magic happens.
  • Your Automated Test Cases are authored and stored here.
  • It includes:
    • Authoring Environment – Create, modify, and manage test scripts.
    • Execution Grid – Handles the actual running of test cases.
    • Cloud Agents – (Coming soon) These agents will run your test cases without needing infrastructure on your side. Less setup, more productivity!

💡 Fun Fact: This is like hiring a smart robot that knows exactly what to test, how to do it, and even sends you a report while you’re sipping coffee.

4. Customer Systems & Execution Agents

 

  • Tests are run against real Customer Systems.
  • Execution happens via:
    • Customer Managed Execution Agents – Already available and in use.
    • Cloud Agents – Planned for the future (don’t worry, they’re not Skynet).

🔧 This setup gives flexibility. You choose whether to keep control in-house or move to the cloud. Either way, your systems get tested without drama.

5. Future-Proof with Cloud Agents

 

  • Though currently under development, Cloud Agents will reduce the need for customer-side infrastructure.
  • Ideal for customers looking for low maintenance and high efficiency.

🤖 Once available, this will be like having an invisible army of testers who never sleep, never eat, and never complain about Monday mornings.

 

🧁 Conclusion

Tricentis Test Automation in SAP Cloud ALM is a powerful solution that makes testing:

 

  • Faster
  • Smarter
  • Less error-prone
  • And a little less painful (we can’t promise zero meetings though 😅)

 

To summarize:

 

  • You define and manage tests in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Test cases are sent to Tricentis Cloud using APIs.
  • Tests are executed either using customer-managed agents or upcoming cloud agents.
  • Results are pulled back into ALM for reporting and analytics.

 

So, whether you’re new to automated testing or already knee-deep in test scripts, integrating TTA with SAP Cloud ALM will save you time, reduce manual effort, and most importantly, help you catch those sneaky bugs before your users do.

 

Because let’s be honest—nothing ruins a good weekend like a defect in production.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM external log open telemetry collector forwa...

You can un-accept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: CAT2 variant not displaying for users
entry.content: A variant was created in CAT2 to include a new column "Project Description". Variant was created and saved as "Project Description" in administrator but the users are not able to see it.  SAP Notes 2066612 & 2442592 have already been referenced and provide no solution.

entry.title: UDF ValidRule in ServiceLayer
entry.content:
Hello All!
I'm trying to create a collection of requests through ServiceLayer to create UDTs and UDF of a solution we're implementing from one company (DEMO) to another (PRODUCTION, another server). However some UDF were created with ValidRules, but when I check the odata from UserFieldsMD those rules do not appear, so I don't know how to implement them in another company without creating a TransactionNotification block or entering the GUI to manually change it.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

We're using SAP Business One for HANA, version 10.0 (10.00.190) FP 2202

Any ideas?

entry.title: How to Identify Documents Posted via MIR7, FV60, FV50, FV65, F-65 Without Attachments
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I’m currently working on an audit and control requirement to track invoice and journal entry postings where no supporting attachments are available.

The objective is to extract a list of documents posted using the following transaction codes:

  • MIR7 – Park Invoice

  • FV60 – Park Vendor Invoice

  • FV50 – Park G/L Document

  • FV65 – Park Credit Memo

  • F-65 – Post Credit Memo

I specifically want to identify the documents that do not have any attachments linked via Generic Object Services (GOS).

I have checked table SRGBTBREL, but:

  • Some parked documents do not appear there

  • Documents posted later via other transactions may lose the original GOS link

Questions:

  1. Is there a standard method or report to extract documents without attachments?

  2. What is the best way (tables or logic) to identify if a document has GOS attachments?

  3. Has anyone implemented a workaround or custom solution to meet a similar requirement?

Appreciate any guidance or recommendations from the community.

entry.title: Best Practices for Quantity Amendments During Component Backflush in SAP PP
entry.content:
Hello SAP PP Experts,

During the component backflush process in SAP PP, I’ve observed that the quantity is amended against the theoretical quantity (QTH) shown for the finished goods. I’m trying to understand what are the best practices followed in this scenario to ensure accurate inventory and production reporting?

Specifically:

  • How should the system handle deviations between actual and theoretical quantities during backflush?

  • Are there recommended configurations or process steps to manage quantity corrections efficiently?

  • What is the impact on inventory valuation and production order confirmation when these adjustments are made?

Any insights, tips, or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Delta sync is not working for custom entity created in SSAM 2405 mobile OData.
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

We have extended the standard mobile Odata for SSAM 2405 mobile application to add a custom entity which reads data from custom table. All the necessary configuration in Syclo and Mobile cockpit are done to store the offline data during sync. 
But entity is triggered only on initial reset of the app and data is stored in local dataset. While on delta sync it does not triggers and updated data in table is not reflected in mobile app. Is delta token implementaion is must to trigger in delta sync ?

entry.title: Additional binding with readonly fields is not working .
entry.content: I am using managed with draft scenario and When I am using additional binding and make the fields as a readonly the data of those fields are not saving in the database. When I make fields editable then the data is saving in the database. In my requirement I need to make the fields as a readonly. Can anyone help me on this issue please

  • When clicking on someone's profile, be able to to filter on most liked or most read posts.

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: No Authorization for transaction S_ER9_11001473 of IM...
entry.content:
Hello @rosa-limardo 

You're encountering a common issue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, where access to certain configuration (IMG) activities like S_ER9_11001473 (activity 106626) and S_EB5_05000350 (activity 106166) is blocked due to missing authorisation catalogs in Central Business Configuration (CBC).

In Public Cloud, access to SSCUIs (configuration activities) is controlled by business catalogues, not transaction codes. When you see an error like:

“No Authorization for transaction S_ER9_11001473 of IMG Activity - ES_V_T059Z_WITHCD2”

Which implies:

  • The user role assigned is missing the business catalogue that enables this configuration activity in CBC.
  • And these catalogue-to-SSCUI mappings are not always documented clearly in the standard Help.

 

Solution

1st option, Use the SAP Fiori App "Business Role Templates"

  • Go to App: Maintain Business Roles
  • Select your role and click on the Assigned Business Catalogues
  • Compare your role with the SAP-delivered template roles (like SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT, SAP_BR_CONF_EXPERT_FIN)

These roles are pre-delivered with access to key configuration SSCUIs.

2nd option: Check with SAP CBC Support Team

For activities like:

  • 106626 → Withholding Tax Configuration
  • 106166 → Tax Codes/Accounts setup

There are restricted access controls, and sometimes manual enablement by SAP is required. Raise a B-component incident on:

XX-CBC-CE-CON (for CBC – Configuration Environment)

Include:

  • Configuration Activity ID (106626 / 106166)
  • Screenshot of the authorisation error
  • The role name you've assigned

SAP can confirm the required business catalogue or enable access if necessary.

SAP Note 3068653: "No authorisation to start UI for configuration activity in CBC – S/4HANA Cloud"

This explains,

  • Why certain SSCUIs are restricted
  • The process to request access

 

 Summary

What You See

What to Do

No auth for S_ER9_11001473, etc.

User role is missing the right catalog

CBC config activity access denied

Use Business Role Template to compare

Not documented in Best Practices matrix

Raise incident under XX-CBC-CE-CON

Let me know if it was helpful

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: "PD Where Used" Button – A Chrome Extension for SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi @vcha-camelot87,

There might be a problem with flow name. Have u tried on another flows? If it still doesn't work, we can debug it together. You can reach me from Linkedin.

entry.title: Challenges with Critical Actions and Permissions in SAP GRC Role Remediation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m currently facing challenges in SAP GRC related to critical actions, critical permissions, and permission lines during role remediation. Our environment has many roles that are inherited or derived from other roles, which complicates the process significantly.

Specifically:

  • When reviewing GRC logs for role removal or remediation, only the main roles are clearly visible, but inherited and derived roles often do not show up straightforwardly.

  • This creates a bottleneck because removing a role based on GRC findings sometimes causes access issues

  • As a result, it’s very difficult to fully decode and understand the effective permissions per user and the impact of role changes.

Could anyone please share:

  • Best practices or approaches to handle critical permission analysis in complex role inheritance scenarios?

  • Reports, tools, or methods within SAP GRC or connected systems that can provide a comprehensive view of all assigned roles (main, inherited, and derived) and their critical permissions?

  • How to effectively manage and streamline role remediation without triggering unexpected permission issues due to inherited/derived roles?

Your insights and recommendations would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Service Order WITH BATCH
entry.content:
Good morning,

Could you please help me with the following error message?

1.A Service Order was created with a material that is managed in batches.

2.The system is asking us to enter a BATCH, but we've searched the entire document and can't find a way to add it.

3.The position also does not allow us to enter the Batch.

 

I've searched for documentation but can't find any. Can you help me? Or should I report it to SAP support?

Thank you 

Gustavo Angel Tamayo Ponce.

entry.title: Re: Production Planning Optimization (PPO) - Part II
entry.content:
Hi @iydanabas thank you for your evaluation and valuable contribution.

In Advanced Planning tab of material master, there is "Lot Size Unit" for PP/DS. But I have tested, it has no effect on cost/penalty consideration.

In conclusion; like MRP, MRP Live, or procurement heuristics in PP/DS; PPO runs based on base unit of measure.

entry.title: AATP Supply Protection with "physical stock" protection
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new in AATP features and trying to understand how SUP will react in the situation below:

Product A 
On Hand600
Incoming300

 

Protection  
Product A - Customer 1500
Product A - Customer 2200
Product A - Customer 3200

Scenario:

1st order for 200 units  is created for Customer 2, since there is enough inventory order is confirmed. Remaining inventory: 300

2nd order for 200 units is created for Customer 3, since there is enough inventory order is confirmed. Remaining inventory: 100 

3rd order for 500 units is created for Customer 1, but now only 100 is available is order cant be confirmed. 

Requirement:

From those 3 customers, customer number 1 is the most important I would like to hold the 500 protect inventory until is fulfilled. 

So, back to scenario above, 1st order would confirm only 100, 2nd order would not confirm any quantity and 3rd order would be completely fulfilled. 

Is that a feature archivable with SUP? Can I use reservation with SUP in conjunction?

Thanks for all comments!

entry.title: Re: Variance to previous year on a year-to-date line char...
entry.content:
@axel_ 

You did nothing wrong and your expectation is logical.

Unfortunately As per the Current Design for Previous Year, Previous Month, Previous Quarter it calculates the previous values for the specified drill level only. As your drill is month it takes full month.

3298003 - The Restricted Measure which contains dynamic restriction "Previous Year" on Date dimension shows incorrect total value on Date hierarchy node in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - SAP for Me

See if the below helps, 

Incorrect Variance Calculation in SAC - SAP Community

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How-to-guide for SAP GUI Scripting
entry.content: Insightful! Thanks for sharing the process.

entry.title: Error on Logout event from SAP Build Work Zone in SAPUI5 page
entry.content:
I am trying to attach a callback to the Logout event from the SAP Build Work Zone in my SAPUI5 application, to then request a logout in my approuter application. This is the logic I added to enable the event:

// UI5 Component
export default class Component extends UIComponent {
	//...
	public init(): void {
		//...

		// Log out when the user clicks the logout button in the shell header (BWZ)
		Container.attachLogoutEvent(() => {
			console.log("Logout event triggered, redirecting to logout endpoint.");
			window.location.replace('/do/logout');
		}, false)
	}
}

 The callback is working on my local tests, and I can see the log message on the console. However, when I try to do same thing inside our SAP Build Work Zone subscription, the callback doesn't run and we see a error message:

 After investigating the source files I notices this error happens when the Logout Event is being created and a deprecated part of the code executes. I wasn't able to find any configurations on SAP Build Work Zone that would fix it, but I might have missed something?

Has anyone else seen this error before? How can I contact the SAP Build Work Zone team to get support?

Thanks

entry.title: How do I apply the "Enabled Single-Sender" Email Address to apply to the Request Feedback email?
entry.content:
Hello, 

Is there a way to apply the Manage Email Notifications > Enable Single Sender to the Request Feedback Notification sent out through the Performance Management module? 

We have Enable Single Sender checked off and it seems to apply to the other email notifications that come from our system (Document Creation, Document Routing, etc), but when a Manager Requests Feedback through the Performance Management module in specific Performance Forms, the email sender is coming from feedbackUNFItest@productsazpreview.sapsf, which often gets mistaken for Spam/Phishing and ignored. How do we update this to come from the email address specified in our Single Sender Email?

 

Thank you!
Geena

entry.title: Re: Error: AI API call failed on the tutorial
entry.content: Hello. I am also facing the same issue? Did you get any resolution? @DarkoB

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Cloud Public, J59- AR: Manage Payment Advi...
entry.content:
Hello,

Notifications are produced by Situation Handling.

To see them, please activate scope item 31N and complete the ‘Manage Situation Types’ preliminary step (copy & enable template FIN_PAYMENTADVICEINVOICESKIPPED).

Once that is in place, the system raises a notification only when a payment advice skips significant invoices – not just when it is deleted. Create an advice that omits ≥ 50 % of the due amount, save it, wait for the backend job, then check the bell icon.

No extra prerequisites beyond that are needed, and 1MV is optional.

Checklist to get the Notification

Item

What to verify

Where

1

Scope item 31N is activated in your system (CBC or “Manage Your Solution”).

Implementation cockpit

2

Manage Situation Types executed end-to-end: copy FIN_PAYMENTADVICEINVOICESKIPPED, press Create, confirm Enable.

App F2947

3

User running Manage Payment Advice (F2550) has a business role that receives AR notifications (e.g. SAP_BR_AR_ACCOUNTANT).

Identity & Access

4

Fiori notification settings are not muted (bell icon ► Settings ► Enable in-app / email).

User’s Launchpad

5

Create a payment advice that actually skips high-value invoices, save it, then wait a minute for the situation job; now delete if you want.

Test run

entry.title: Re: Table RESB~Matnr link to Table COSP~Target Qty?
entry.content: We are trying to compare actual consumption postings to the target QTY (not planned, nor requirement QTY) of the process order. The target represents the actually produced qty and we want a simple report where the user can see by process order and material list what was consumed compared to the target QTY. The report will be run by a variance variable, e.g. return all posting, which have a variance +/- 3 percent. We understand that in order this report needs to work we will need to run the KKS1 for the order. Our BOM's include a scrap factor so we will add the STPO table to get the inflated qty.

entry.title: Get Selected Value in Combobox Column (Grid Object)
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I created a ComboBox column in my grid object using the following line of code:

Grid0.Columns.Item(8).Type = SAPbouiCOM.BoGridColumnType.gct_ComboBox;

 

I have a DataTable and a grid.

I call the ExecuteQuery() method on DataSources.DataTable and then transform the column type to ComboBox. Additionally, I am populating the field with valid values.

The problem is: how can I retrieve the value selected by the user on the screen? When I select a value from the list, the field remains null (nothing is selected).

The user will open the list of valid values and select one of them. I tried to create a UserDataSource to bind the column, but I believe that's not possible for grid objects.

How can I display the ComboBox and fill the field with the value selected by the user?

 

I tried this code above, but it shows the error {"Valid Value - Value does not Exist [66000-62]"}

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to read SQ01 Query in ABAP Program.
entry.content: Use de FM RSAQ_REMOTE_QUERY_CALL

entry.title: Re: SAP Story Analytics Timesheet report
entry.content:
Have you thought about converting the balance for the other leave types into hours through a calculated column?

entry.title: Re: CORUPROC transaction not clearing AFFW data
entry.content: We have checked the type_x error cases occur only when the standard program is going to delete records from the AFFW table

entry.title: Re: CORUPROC transaction not clearing AFFW data
entry.content: DELETE affw FROM TABLE affw_d. * erfolgreich ? IF sy-subrc EQ 4. DESCRIBE TABLE affw_d LINES tmp_entries. MESSAGE x803 WITH 'AFFW' tmp_entries sy-dbcnt. ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Carrier are not assigned automatically to freight order
entry.content: Hi Rogerio- i am unable to find this note.

entry.title: Re: Error in outbound IDoc: "EDI: Field ARCKEY in control...
entry.content:
Check if there is any STATUS Idoc is posting and updating this Idoc. And also check history of this Idoc.

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Quick Sizer tool
entry.content:
We have been using quick sizer tool to estimate the CPU memory , but the tool is not clear and not provided the correct information. 

Used the Non-HANA-based Classic Quick Sizer option to download and use the Quick Sizer tool.

Questions:

  1. In the sizing tool shows Crystal Report 2016 instead of 2020. Is it possible to change to 2020 version?
  2.  Once filled and runs the tools, it only shows "Results show "Medium CPU - 64GB memory" , but customer requires a detailed breakdown of:
    1. How many required virtual CPUs?
    2. How many RAM allocation?
    3. Is it possible to have more detailed hardware specifications is needed?
  3.  Is it possible to print and/or save as PDF?

 

Followed instructions on how to use the Quick Sizer tool to calculate CPU, disk, memory and I/O resource for your BI 4.x environment - SAP for Me

Please advice. Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Quick Sizer tool
entry.content:
We have been using quick sizer tool to estimate the CPU memory , but the tool is not clear and not provided the correct information. 

Used the Non-HANA-based Classic Quick Sizer option to download and use the Quick Sizer tool.

Questions:

  1. In the sizing tool shows Crystal Report 2016 instead of 2020. Is it possible to change to 2020 version?
  2.  Once filled and runs the tools, it only shows "Results show "Medium CPU - 64GB memory" , but customer requires a detailed breakdown of:
    1. How many required virtual CPUs?
    2. How many RAM allocation?
    3. Is it possible to have more detailed hardware specifications is needed?
  3.  Is it possible to print and/or save as PDF?

 

Followed instructions on how to use the Quick Sizer tool to calculate CPU, disk, memory and I/O resource for your BI 4.x environment - SAP for Me

Please advice. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Error in outbound IDoc: "EDI: Field ARCKEY in control...
entry.content: The status of the IDoc is status 51. I am using the IDoc SOAP adapter. How do I check for the history?

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
For our organization, both the performance rating and the talent rank are updated in the employee's profile through the extended user import process, which occurs once the performance cycle and calibration cycle have been completed and finalized.

We do not maintain a compensation history section within the employee's profile that encompasses both the historical rating and ranking; instead, these are kept in separate sections or blocks within the profile. Additionally, employees are allowed to view their rating, while their ranking remains hidden from them.

During each compensation cycle, we manually upload the current and previous year's ranking values along with the rating value from the prior year. The rating value for the current year is sourced from the performance management form.

Given this process, is it possible to utilize the MDF feature in a non-EC enabled instance, or do you have any suggestions for minimizing the manual workload in the compensation worksheets? Please inform me.

entry.title: Re: Integration Center demo for the Compensation Module
entry.content:
@xavierlegarrec , 

For our organization, both the performance rating and the talent rank are updated in the employee's profile through the extended user import process, which occurs once the performance cycle and calibration cycle have been completed and finalized.

We do not maintain a compensation history section within the employee's profile that encompasses both the historical rating and ranking; instead, these are kept in separate sections or blocks within the profile. Additionally, employees are allowed to view their rating, while their ranking remains hidden from them.

During each compensation cycle, we manually upload the current and previous year's ranking values along with the rating value from the prior year. The rating value for the current year is sourced from the performance management form.

Given this process, is it possible to utilize the MDF feature in a non-EC enabled instance, or do you have any suggestions for minimizing the manual workload in the compensation worksheets? Please inform me.

entry.title: How to delete bgRFC units automatically?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to delete or Remove error units from bgRFC queue automatically without any Manual intervention.   

We know the process to delete this unit manually using SBGRFCMON however we would like to know any automated  process is available for this task.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete bgRFC units automatically?
entry.content:
Hello, 

It's possible to schedule the program RS_BGRFC_MASS_OPERATIONS in background mode for daily bgRFC units deletion. For more information about report, refer to SAP Note below:

3018243 - Mass delete or unlock bgRFC units in background

Regards

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Hello @TheFizzlee 

You're getting the "insufficient privilege" error in PROD because the currency conversion tables (TCUR) weren’t shared* from the SAP space to the PROD space, even though they were shared to TEST.

How to fix.

  • Go back to the Currency Conversion Views Creator
  • Select the SAP space as the source
  • Click “Share” and select the PROD space

This ensures PROD has access to the TCUR tables behind the views; otherwise, imports will work, but runtime access will fail.

Let me know if it works

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: BTP Background Job Scheduling | Consume RAP Service from BTP (Node JS)
entry.content:
This is a question from the customer.  Can we use SAP BTP Job Scheduler to schedule jobs in SAP S/4HANA SM37.

Meaning we create the job in S/4HANA SM37.   Scheduling this should be done in SAP BTP Job Scheduler.. The Customer is trying to replace RunMyJobs by Redwood with SAP BTP Job Scheduler 

Is this possible, I keep hearing that BTP Job Scheduler is used for BTP Jobs alone can you please help me uderstand more.

entry.title: Re: Traslape en tabla de cuotas patronales para Cesantia y Vejez
entry.content:
Hola Hugo,

Revise este tema con el área de negocio y su postura es que el valor correcto es aplicar el 4.954% para el supuesto planteado. 

Anexo los comentarios:

En realidad, en la práctica los primeros 4 rangos no tienen aplicación, hasta el quinto con un 5.307 %

El IMSS no permite dar de alta a un empleado con el salario mínimo de $278.80 es decir sin su respectivo factor de integración mínimo de ley, por lo tanto, el SBC mínimo es de $292.54 y nos aplica el 5.307% en esa rama.

María Elena Ramírez

Saludos.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud planning - Data action issue
entry.content:
Hi @pragnya_m ,  if you have the periods being maintained as the properties of version dimension, here is an example how to filter out the data in data action formulas. 

More details can be found in help doc:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/afe93e3cf1414a7b8419baad11cc066e.html#loio4ab31f8c107a427387da65eb7c9fccbb

entry.title: Re: Service Order WITH BATCH
entry.content:
Hello @AngelT 

You're getting the "Enter Lote" error because the material is batch-managed, and the system requires a batch number during service confirmation.

Next step

  • Use the “Manage Service Confirmations” app, and the batch field ("Lote") is visible there.
  • Enter the batch number manually or select it using F4.
  • If the field is still missing, use the “Post Goods Movement” app and enter the batch during the 261 movement.

Let me know if it works

With regards

Chuma

I need to create a bank of data to test macroprocess in S4hana private cloud.

Thanks.

there seems to be an error in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/d6c1ceb7e0074cd1a8f28dad8a1a649c/9517d652293c0026e10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Request for Business Role to License Type Mapping Document
entry.content:
Hi,

Please explain how to check the app names along with their associated license types, such as Advanced, Core, or Self-Service. 

Regards,

Silambarasan


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Request for Business Role to License Type Mapping Doc...
entry.content:
Dear Silambarasan,

The Price Category is related to Business Role and Business Catalog, but not for specific app.

To check the price category of business role and business catalog, you can use app "IAM Information System".

After you select the Main Entity as "Business Role" or "Business Catalog", there will be columns "Business Role Price Category" and "Business Catalog Price Category".

For more information about the price category and FUE, you can check the threads below:

Did you say FUE? A definition. - SAP Community

Understanding the Price Category information - SAP Community

Thanks and Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: PO Form Template Extend Custom Field to Limit Item Nodes
entry.content: Did you get the answer for this?

entry.title: Get Certified in SAP Sales Cloud V2 with Our Live Session Series!
entry.content:
Are you ready to take your career in sales technology to the next level? Do you want to become a go-to expert in implementing one of the most innovative sales solutions on the market? Then mark your calendars!

SAP Learning is thrilled to announce a brand-new live session series designed to help you ace the SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 exam!

Click here to explore the full series and register

Why SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?

In today's fast-paced sales environment, businesses need more than just basic CRM. SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 is a game-changer, empowering sales teams with:

  • AI and Machine Learning: Predictive analytics, intelligent recommendations, and automated insights to help reps prioritize leads and close deals faster.
  • Seamless Integration: Connects effortlessly with the broader SAP ecosystem (ERP, S/4HANA, etc.) for a truly end-to-end business process.
  • Modern User Experience: Intuitive, mobile-first design built on SAP Fiori for enhanced usability and adoption.
  • Flexibility & Extensibility: Low-code/no-code options and an API-first approach for easy customization and integration.

This isn't just about managing customer data; it's about driving intelligent engagement and accelerating business growth. As more companies adopt this powerful solution, the demand for skilled implementation consultants is skyrocketing.

Why Get Certified?

Earning your "SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Sales Cloud Version 2" certification demonstrates your foundational knowledge and in-depth skills in implementing and administering this cutting-edge solution. It validates that you:

  • Possess a comprehensive understanding of SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 fundamentals.
  • Can actively participate in project teams focusing on Sales Cloud V2 implementations in a mentored role.
  • Are equipped to configure key sales-specific capabilities, manage master data, and understand extensibility options.
  • Understand critical areas like Lead and Opportunity Management, Activities Management, Mobile App capabilities, and the integration of Machine Learning and Generative AI.

This certification is your badge of excellence, differentiating you in the job market and opening doors to exciting career opportunities!

What You'll Get from These Live Sessions:

This exclusive series of live sessions, led by an SAP expert, is quite simply your best shot at prepping for success. You'll walk away with:

  • Comprehensive Coverage: This is a 6-part live session series, each about an hour long, designed to take you through the entire content of the learning journeys.
  • Deep Dives: Expert-led sessions covering the key topics and modules you'll need to master for the certification exam. You'll get an "expert's eye" on what's truly important for both the exam and real-world application.
  • Practical Insights: Get a feel for actual implementation scenarios and pick up best practices you can use right away.
  • Interactive Learning: Chat directly with SAP experts and get your burning questions answered live.
  • True Confidence: Step into your certification exam feeling completely ready and sure of your abilities.

Seriously, don't let this incredible chance to boost your skills and validate your expertise in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 slip by!

Check out the link below for the full schedule, all the session details, and make sure to register today:

https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/get-certified-sap-certified-associate-implementation-consultant-sap-sales-cloud-version-2

Invest in yourself and become the SAP Sales Cloud Version 2 implementation wizard everyone needs. Your next big career move is waiting!

entry.title: Re: Using SAVE_TEXT in VF01 for item texts
entry.content:
Sorry to post here after it mentioned solved, because my requirement is also related to this topic.

I am trying to update the settlement month in the item text of an invoice from the billing plan. Initially I have implemented the logic in the userexit RV60AFZC, which is triggered during invoice creation (VF01). However, after the invoice is created, the item text is not updated when I check in VF02 or VF03. It appears that the TDNAME in the SAVE_TEXT function does not contain the billing document number during invoice creation, causing the item text update to fail. then I tried on the RV60AFZZ under number range user exit same issue. 

Can you please guide me on this problem? 

Thanks.

entry.title: 2LIS_02_ITM did not get the deleted item of PO in ME22N ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We deleted the items of PO using the t-code ME22N.

After that, clear and refill the setup of 2LIS_02_ITM and run the DTP of FULL extraction.

The key of transformation and 0RECORDMODE.

But the Active table of ADSO still have the deleted item (EBELP = 03810) after activating the request.

Any steps wrong ?

Tks a lot for helping me.

entry.title: Re: [EWM] How to map hu level warehoust task to matdoc? (...
entry.content:
Hi,

If my understanding is correct, if you are seeking a connection between a task from EWM and a material document, you should be able to locate it in MKPF. The field SPE_MDNUM_EWM is concatenated with the warehouse number and task number. We will need to separate this information in the extraction code of the program.

Thanks

Mayur Sharma (mayurs819)

entry.title: 国内跨公司销售POD不生效
entry.content:
同一个公司下的销售组织和工厂，POD使用正常； 国内的跨公司销售（工厂和销售组织属于不同公司），POD不能使用；销售订单带出的移动类型为601，带不出687 。如下图：

 

IMG中“设置现货销售与 VSiT 流程的相关性”不允许配置工厂和销售组织属于不同公司的配置；如下图

entry.title: Re: 国内跨公司销售POD不生效
entry.content: 问题：国内跨公司销售（cross company sell）要使用POD，该怎么设置？

entry.title: Issue with Updating Item Text in Invoice Using Userexit RV60AFZC and RV60AFZZ in SAP
entry.content:
I am trying to update the settlement month in the item text of an invoice from the billing plan. Initially I have implemented the logic in the userexit RV60AFZC, which is triggered during invoice creation (VF01). However, after the invoice is created, the item text is not updated when I check in VF02 or VF03. It appears that the TDNAME in the SAVE_TEXT function does not contain the billing document number during invoice creation, causing the item text update to fail. then I tried on the RV60AFZZ under number range user exit same issue. 

Can you please guide me on this problem? 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Understanding ABAP Pipeline Engine used for Data Integration in Datasphere
entry.content: Excellent, Good to hear basic concepts of SLT and APE

entry.title: Re: How to restrict Q4 and B6 stock type at WPT level
entry.content:
Hi,

 

If you’re looking to restrict certain WPTs to be used for picking, you can drive it from the picking strategy. For instance, regardless of what picking reference document requests, the picking strategy only looks at the F2 stock type. This means that other stock types are skipped, and the task can only be created by a specific WPT with the F2 stock type.

 

If you’re looking to influence inbound receipt stock types to have only the F2 stock type, irrespective of the reference document, you can partially address this by having an availability group in the WPT to force the F2 stock type. However, this may not ensure that your entire requirement is met. Additionally, the storage type stock type should be maintained as mandatory with the value of FF stock type. This automatically flips the stock type even if the reference document says otherwise.

 

If your requirement is about internal tasks or ad hoc, I don’t think there’s a way to handle it in the standard. You may have to influence it through a BADI with system messages to restrict other stock types.

 

Thanks,

Mayur Sharma (mayurs819)

entry.title: Can I implement @ObjectModel.query.implementedBy in view entity, not custom entity?
entry.content:
i have project to show list report and object page of purchase order. i use view entity and draft, i want to implement logic to fill the note and text of purchase order with query implement by, but i ecounter problem when do that

is that we can't do query implement in view entity? what alternative so i can get the note and text by read_text

entry.title: Re: Bank Statement MT940
entry.content:
Hi @Chuma,

Please confirm, can I create more than 1 account symbol?

Because the client has a lot of Bank accounts. and a different account code for bank incoming and bank outgoing.

Sample

Bank A:  1XXXX1 Bank Balance, 1XXXX2 Bank Incoming, 1XXXX3 Bank Outgoing

Bank B:   1XXXX4 Bank Balance, 1XXXX5 Bank Incoming, 1XXXX6 Bank Outgoing

Thanks,

Chanaporn S.

entry.title: Z migration object names generated for Z projects in Migration Modeler
entry.content:
Hi,

In app Migrate Your Data and tcode LTMOM, we can find the object technical names begins with 'Z'. Can you confirm if this is a normal acceptable behavior?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Z migration object names generated for Z projects in...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Yes, this is the standard behavior of data migration

You can check naming convention in KBA 3588725 - FAQ for migration cockpit. Migration approach: Transfer / Migrate data using staging tables (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition) - SAP for Me

  • Below is an example for a generated staging table for object Work center (SIF_WORK_CNTR) and structure S_KAZY

  • Table name: /1LT/DS<sys-id><consecutive number>

    • For example: /1LT/DSQKX000928

  • Table description: Z_<Alias = technical Object name without SIF_>_<Mass transfer ID>:<structure name>

    • For example: Z_WORK_CNTR_U02:S_KAZY

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Intercompany reconciliation - Transaction and company...
entry.content:
Hi @Gabor5,

This is correct.

Both sides (seller and buyer) recorded the transaction in consistent currency (WSL transaction currency) and amount, resulting in zero difference. When switching to their company code currency, the partner company has RON as their company code currency, which converted from 220 EUR. Hence the 2 lines listed by currency, and the difference is no longer comparable due to difference currency codes. See more info in Reconciliation Balances ( https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/68f41968f351435eb416acfecf8c4aa5.html).

Thanks!

Grace

entry.title: How to exclude hedged open items from foreign currency valuation using exchange rate fields?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

My question is:
Is there a way to configure foreign currency valuation to exclude open items with a manually fixed exchange rate, such as those covered by FX contracts?

Background:
In Japan, FX contracts are typically managed through allocation rather than SAP’s hedge management functionality. For open items (e.g., sales orders or invoices) that are already covered by FX contracts, we would like to exclude them from foreign currency valuation during month-end closing.

We noticed the field "Accounting Exchange Rate" is available in the document and are wondering if it can be used as a condition to exclude such items from valuation.

Attached screenshots for reference:

Sales Order screen – showing the manually maintained exchange rate

Journal Entry (Accounting Document) – showing the accounting exchange rate carried over

Foreign Currency Valuation result – showing that the item is still being evaluated

Any advice, experience, or workaround (even using enhancements or BAdIs) would be very helpful.

Thank you in advance.

FYI: We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2408).

thank you for the blog post, one question though, will partners be allowed to migrate BW from on-premises to PCE?

 

 Thank you

 Andre

that is for custom entity.

you can use virtual element for your requirement.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Studio Deployment Failed in Production
entry.content: I attempted to activate my solution in the Implementation Manager; however, I consistently receive a "Deployment Failed" message. My internet connection is stable, and the deployment to the test tenant was successful. Unfortunately, I am unable to deploy it to the production tenant.
